dialogue.speaker: eve
dialogue.englishText: I have gotten a man with the help of YHWH

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: Why are you angry, and why has your face fallen?

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: If you do well, will you not be accepted? And if you do not do well, sin is crouching at the door. Its desire is for you, but you must rule over it

dialogue.speaker: cain
dialogue.englishText: I do not know; am I my brother's keeper?

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: What have you done? The voice of your brother's blood is crying to me from the ground

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: And now you are cursed from the ground, which has opened its mouth to receive your brother's blood from your hand

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: When you work the ground, it shall no longer yield to you its strength. You shall be a fugitive and a wanderer on the earth

dialogue.speaker: cain
dialogue.englishText: My punishment is greater than I can bear

dialogue.speaker: cain
dialogue.englishText: Behold, you have driven me today away from the ground, and from your face I shall be hidden. I shall be a fugitive and a wanderer on the earth, and whoever finds me will kill me

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: Therefore, if anyone kills Cain, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold

dialogue.speaker: lamech-cainite
dialogue.englishText: Adah and Zillah, hear my voice; you wives of Lamech, listen to what I say: I have killed a man for wounding me, a young man for striking me

dialogue.speaker: lamech-cainite
dialogue.englishText: If Cain's revenge is sevenfold, then Lamech's is seventy-sevenfold

dialogue.speaker: eve
dialogue.englishText: God has appointed for me another offspring instead of Abel, for Cain killed him
